questions.enonce: In the digital age, the line between private and public is :
Cybersecurity is the practice of protecting systems and networks from digital attacks.
A person whose personal life is constantly reported in the media is a public {{1}}.

pairs.right: Analyzing large sets of data to find patterns
Converted into a code to prevent unauthorized access

questions.enonce: Which value is essential for a healthy public space ?
options: Mutual respect and freedom of speech
